title: Domain Model & Project Structure
description: Design the core entity classes (Book, Member, BorrowRecord) and set up the Java project structure with proper package organization.

title: Catalogue Service & Search
description: Implement the BookCatalogueService with CRUD operations and a multi-criteria search engine using Java Streams and Collections.

title: Borrowing & Return Engine
description: Implement the full borrow/return lifecycle with availability checks, due date calculation, overdue detection, and fine computation.

title: File Persistence & CLI Interface
description: Persist all data to disk using Java Serialization (or JSON via Jackson). Build an interactive CLI menu loop.

title: Testing & Code Review
description: Write JUnit tests for all business logic methods. Run a self code review against SOLID principles.
